# Next Steps {.unnumbered}

Now that you have mastered the basics of the R programming language, below are some resources to extend your learning.

## Workshops

Please visit [LibCal](https://libcal.smu.edu/calendar?cid=15527&t=g&d=0000-00-00&cal=15527&cm=8175&inc=0) to register for additional R workshops. Topics include:

- *Data Science Workflows in R*
- *Effective Data Visualization in R*

## Online Resources

- [Hands-On Programming in R](https://rstudio-education.github.io/hopr) *by Garrett Grolemund*

- [Advanced R](https://adv-r.hadley.nz/) *by Hadley Wickham*

- [R for Data Science (2e)](https://r4ds.hadley.nz/) *by Hadley Wickham et. al.*
